--dTy3Mrz/UPE2dbVg
 Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="IS0zKkzwUGydFO0o"

 --IS0zKkzwUGydFO0o
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
 Content-Disposition: inline
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 
 On Mon, Sep 22, 2008 at 11:29:52AM +0200, Guy Brand wrote:
 > Hello,
 >=20
 > Thanks for updating the ports sources to 1.5.2.1. Removing the
 > patch-tree.c reintroduced bad output that was observed with 1.5.1.1
 > in -CURRENT. I'll try to redo the patch for 1.5.2.1, but feel free to
 > get back if you succeed before me.
 >=20
 Hi,
 
 I redo the patch file patch-tree.c, which works fine on FreeBSD 7.0R amd64 &
 i386.
 
 Just follow the attachment.
 
 Best Regards,
 yzlin
 
 --IS0zKkzwUGydFO0o
 Content-Type: text/x-csrc; charset=utf-8
 Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="patch-tree.c"
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 
 --- tree.c.orig	2008-08-28 03:05:43.000000000 +0800
 +++ tree.c	2008-09-22 21:37:05.000000000 +0800
 @@ -663,7 +663,7 @@
  #ifdef __USE_FILE_OFFSET64
      if (inodeflag) sprintf(path," %7lld",(*dir)->inode);
  #else
 -    if (inodeflag) sprintf(path," %7ld",(*dir)->inode);
 +    if (inodeflag) sprintf(path," %7u",(*dir)->inode);
  #endif
      if (devflag) sprintf(path+strlen(path), " %3d", (int)(*dir)->dev);
  #ifdef __EMX__
 @@ -1276,7 +1276,12 @@
    char *unit=3D"BKMGTPEZY";
    int idx;
 =20
 -  if (!hflag) sprintf(buf, sizeof(off_t) =3D=3D sizeof(long long)? " %11ll=
 d" : " %9ld", size);
 +  if (!hflag) {
 +	if (sizeof(off_t) =3D=3D sizeof(__int64_t))
 +	  sprintf(buf, sizeof(long) =3D=3D sizeof(long long) ? " %11ld" : " %11ll=
 d", size);
 +	else
 +	  sprintf(buf, sizeof(long) =3D=3D sizeof(long long) ? " %9ld" : " %9lld"=
 , size);
 +  }
    else {
      for (idx=3Dsize<1024?0:1; size >=3D (1024*1024); idx++,size>>=3D10);
      if (!idx) sprintf(buf, " %4d", (int)size);
 
 --IS0zKkzwUGydFO0o--
 
 --dTy3Mrz/UPE2dbVg
